chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A.No. 350 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 688/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.04.2026. Mr. Talib Khan Bhatti, Advocate for applicant. = Counsel for the applicant submits that he does not wish to press this revision application and requests for withdrawal of the same on the ground that legal points raised in the revision application may be taken by the concerned 7th Additional District Judge, Hyderabad in Summary Suit No.27/2023. No harm will be caused to the respondent as the grounds of revision are legal and may be raised in the proceedings of the Summary Suit. Accordingly the request is allowed. The revision is disposed of as above along with pending application with direction to the trial Court to proceed with the matter instituted in the year 2023 expeditiously. JUDGE Tufail
